# Anki to PDF Converter

Anki to PDF Converter is a client-side web tool that converts Anki `.apkg` decks into printable PDF files.

## Purpose
- Convert Anki decks (`.apkg`) to PDF
- Preserve card text and embedded images
- Keep processing private by running in-browser

## Tech Stack
- Next.js + TypeScript
- JSZip for archive parsing
- sql.js (WASM SQLite) for reading Anki DB
- jsPDF for PDF generation

## Privacy
- Files are processed locally in the browser
- No card data upload is required
